creator: linuxonlinehelp.de@gmail.com
text:
System: AMD64 2Core, 16GB Ram, 500GB Raid1 kernel=GENERIC-NODEBUG

/sbin/dump Fails after upgrade with buildworld with head (llvm60/clang6)
on 5G (/var) no Problem but
100G /usr Fails  (/rescue/dump ok)

Pc #/sbin/dump -0Lauf /Backups/gm0p5-usr-$date.dump /dev/mirror/gm0p5
